hooks.command: keep prompt session-start -t 'session=${.session_id}' 2>/dev/null || echo 'keep warning: session-start hook failed. Check that the embedding provider is available (e.g. ollama serve).'
keep now 'User prompt: ${.prompt|text}' --truncate -t 'session=${.session_id}' 2>/dev/null || echo 'keep warning: memory not recorded — embedding provider unavailable. Run: ollama serve'
keep prompt subagent-start -t 'session=${.session_id}' 2>/dev/null || echo 'keep warning: subagent-start hook failed. Check that the embedding provider is available (e.g. ollama serve).'

keep now 'Assistant response: ${.last_assistant_message}' --truncate -t 'session=${.session_id}' 2>/dev/null || echo 'keep warning: memory not recorded — embedding provider unavailable. Run: ollama serve'

keep now 'Subagent response: ${.last_assistant_message}' --truncate -t 'session=${.session_id}' 2>/dev/null || echo 'keep warning: memory not recorded — embedding provider unavailable. Run: ollama serve'
